config.script:
'getuserprofileLong #include "50203"
'sqlwhere_rs_lists_with_object #include "50102" #include "50101"
dim nLimit:nLimit = APPCONFIG_PLUGIN_RAPORT_ROW_COUNT
function security_nr_rachunku_bankowego(byref pKlient) dim oM60182 : set oM60182 = doc_.getmodule(60182)
security_nr_rachunku_bankowego = oM60182.dodaj_sume_kontrolna_do_rachunku_bankowego(_ "116022447961" + right("000000000000" + replace(pKlient.strIndeks, "MS", "") + "00",12))
end function
sub plug_klient_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Indeks").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strIndeks
#ifndef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Skrot").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strSkrot #endif
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("NIP").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strNIP
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Grupa klientów").element.bold = true set pTB.newcell.addtext(pKlient.pGrupaKlient.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='pGrupaKlient'")
'adres pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Ulica").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strUlica dim strNrDomu:strNrDomu = pKlient.strNrDomu if not pKlient.strNrLokalu="" then strNrDomu = strNrDomu + "/ " + pKlient.strNrLokalu end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nr domu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext strNrDomu 'miejscowosc z kodem dim strKodPoczta:strKodPoczta = pKlient.strKod if strKodPoczta = "" then strKodPoczta = pKlient.strPoczta else strKodPoczta = strKodPoczta + ", " + pKlient.strPoczta end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Kod/Poczta").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext strKodPoczta
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Miejscowość").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.pMiejscowosc.text
'telefony dim strTel:strTel = pKlient.strTel1 + " " + pKlient.strTel2 + " " + pKlient.strTel3 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Telefony").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext strTel
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Fax").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strFax
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("E-mail").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtexthli pKlient.strEmail , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='createmail_for_root' propc_email='strEmail'") pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby wysłać e-mail na ten adres"
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("WWW").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtexthli pKlient.strWWW , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='navigate' propc_email='strWWW'") pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby otworzyć tę stronę"
if pKlient.kli_cBlokadaSprz = "1" then pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan = clng(2) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_CENTER pTB.addtext("B L O K A D A S P R Z E D A Ż Y").element.bold = true pTB.element.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if
#ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Faktura elektroniczna").element.bold = true if pKlient.eFaktura = 1 then pTB.newcell.addtext ("Tak") else pTB.newcell.addtext ("Nie") end if pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Wysłanie faktury mailem").element.bold = true if pKlient.strTel4 = "1" then pTB.newcell.addtext ("Tak") else pTB.newcell.addtext ("Nie") end if #endif
#ifdef _SECURITY pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Rachunek do wpłat").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext security_nr_rachunku_bankowego(pKlient) #else pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Zebrane punkty").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext nx_.display.quantity(nx_get_suma_punktow_progloj(pKlient.idobj),"",2) #endif
#ifdef _NXM pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Uwagi").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.strUwagi #endif
#ifdef _FRAM pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Limit kredytowy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext nx_.display.quantity(pKlient.curLimitKred,pKlient.pWalutaLimitu.strSkrot,2) #endif
if not pKlient.pPracownik is nothing then pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Obsługa handlowa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pKlient.pPracownik.strNazwisko + " "+ pKlient.pPracownik.strImie end if end sub
sub plug_klient_pracownicy(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim nMaxCount : nMaxCount = getuserprofileLong(USERPROF_MAX_WORKERS)
dim pCrsr : set pCrsr=trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK, _ "eAktywny=" + CStr(N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK_AKTYWNY) + " and pKlient=" + CStr(idKlient), "strNazwisko, strImie, strImie2", "") pCrsr.top = nMaxCount
if not pCrsr.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Imie,nazwisko").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Stanowisko").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("E-mail").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Telefon").element.bold = true
dim bEvenRow : bEvenRow = true dim pPracownik for each pPracownik in pCrsr dim pNewHli
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli pPracownik.strImie + " " + pPracownik.strNazwisko , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK' vn2='"+cstr(pPracownik.idobj)+"'") pTB.newcell.addtext(pPracownik.strStanowisko)
pTB.newcell if pPracownik.strEmail <> "" then pTB.addtexthli pPracownik.strEmail , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='createmail_for_root' propc_email='strEmail' vs1='TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK' vs2='"+cstr(pPracownik.idobj)+"'") end if
pTB.newcell dim strTelephones : strTelephones = pPracownik.strTel1
if pPracownik.strTel2 <> "" then strTelephones=strTelephones + ";"+pPracownik.strTel2 end if
pTB.addtext(strTelephones)
next end sub
sub plug_klient_listawyboru(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_listawyboru pContainer,pKlient,nLimit end sub
sub plug_klient_finanse_podsum(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Obroty z naszą firmą") dim rs:set rs = trans_.createadors(sql_for_obroty(pKlient)) dim curValue:curValue = rs.fields("obroty").value pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curValue , "")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan=2 pTB.row.height=200 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli "Wszystkie należności" , doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=NALEZNOSCI_NIEROZLICZONE appvarParamTypeid=TYPEID_N5KLIENT appvarParamIdobj="+cstr(idKlient)) pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć szczegółowy raport" dim curNaleznAll: curNaleznAll = get_nal_zob(pKlient,false,N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC,false) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curNaleznAll , "")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli "Należności przeterminowane" , doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=NALEZNOSCI_PRZETERMINOWANE appvarParamTypeid=TYPEID_N5KLIENT appvarParamIdobj="+cstr(idKlient)) pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć szczegółowy raport" curValue = get_nal_zob(pKlient,true,N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC,false) pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curValue , "")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan=2 pTB.row.height=200 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Pozostały limit kredytowy") dim curLimitKred: curLimitKred = pKlient.curLimitKred - get_nal_zob(pKlient,false,N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC,true) if curLimitKred < ccur(0) then pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curLimitKred, pKlient.pWalutaLimitu.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.forecolor = RGB(255, 0, 0) else pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curLimitKred, pKlient.pWalutaLimitu.strSkrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if #endif
pTB.newrow.newcell.cell.colspan=2 pTB.row.height=200 pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli "Wszystkie zobowiązania" , doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=ZOBOWIAZANIA_NIEROZLICZONE appvarParamTypeid=TYPEID_N5KLIENT appvarParamIdobj="+cstr(idKlient)) pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć szczegółowy raport" curValue = get_nal_zob(pKlient,false,N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE,false) #ifdef _CTP if curValue < 0 then curValue = curValue * (-1) end if #endif pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curValue , "")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli "Zobowiązania przeterminowane" , doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_TRANSAKCJE appvar_raport_type=ZOBOWIAZANIA_PRZETERMINOWANE appvarParamTypeid=TYPEID_N5KLIENT appvarParamIdobj="+cstr(idKlient)) pTB.element.tip = "Kliknij aby obejrzeć szczegółowy raport" curValue = get_nal_zob(pKlient,true,N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE,false) #ifdef _CTP if curValue < 0 then curValue = curValue * (-1) end if #endif pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curValue , "")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
end sub
sub plug_klient_dokumenty(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim query:query = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select n5dokument.strTematDokum as temat, " + _ " n5dokument.idobj as id, " + _ " n5dokument.dDataRejestracji as rej, " + _ " n5dokument.dDataWeWy as wewy " + _ " from n5dokument " + _ " left join n5klient as n5k_n on n5dokument.wpNadawca = n5k_n.idobj and n5dokument.wpNadawca_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT " + _ " left join n5klient_pracownik as n5pk_n on n5dokument.wpNadawca = n5pk_n.idobj and n5dokument.wpNadawca_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK " + _ " left join n5klient as n5k_a on n5dokument.wpAdresat = n5k_a.idobj and n5dokument.wpAdresat_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT " + _ " left join n5klient_pracownik as n5pk_a on n5dokument.wpAdresat = n5pk_a.idobj and n5dokument.wpAdresat_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK " + _ " where " + _ " n5k_n.idobj = %1 or " + _ " n5pk_n.pKlient = %1 or " + _ " n5k_a.idobj = %1 or " + _ " n5pk_a.pKlient = %1 " + _ " order by n5dokument.dDataRejestracji desc ") _ .add(cstr(idKlient)) _ .done()
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query)
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_DOKUMENTY dim nPage: nPage = 8 #ifdef _SECURITY nPage = 7 #endif if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = nPage then nLimit = 9999 else nLimit = 10 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = nPage end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Temat").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Rejestracja").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER pTB.newcell.addtext("Wpłynięcie/wysłanie").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER
dim iter:iter = 0 while not oRecordset.eof iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("temat").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("id").value)+"'") pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("rej").value) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("wewy").value) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER oRecordset.movenext wend
end sub
sub plug_klient_wz(byref pContainer,byval idKlient, byval strWhere)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim query:query = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select 'idobj'=max(p_idobj),'nrdok'=p_strnrdok,'datawyst'=max(p_ddatawyst),'iloscpoz'=count(*) " +_ " from vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje " +_ " where p_nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK__WZ and p_pKlient = %1 " + strWhere + " " +_ " group by p_strnrdok " +_ " order by p_strnrdok ") _ .add(cstr(idKlient)) _ .done()
dim oRecordset set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query)
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nr dokumentu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wystawienia").element.bold = true #ifndef _BARON pTB.newcell.addtext("Liczba pozycji").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER #endif
dim iter:iter = 0 while not oRecordset.eof iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("nrdok").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKMAG' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("idobj").value)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("datawyst").value) #ifndef _BARON pTB.newcell.addtext doc_.afc.display.quantity(oRecordset.fields("iloscpoz").value,"",0) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD #endif oRecordset.movenext wend
end sub
sub plug_klient_projekty_abas(byref pContainer,byval idKlient, byval strWhere)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim query : query = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select 'idobj'=idobj,'nazwa'=proj_strNazwa,'data_um'=proj_dDataUmowy,'wartosc'=proj_curWartosc " +_ " from n5projekt_abas " +_ " where proj_pKlient = %1 " +_ " order by proj_dDataUmowy") _ .add(cstr(idKlient)) _ .done()
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(query) if oRS.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data umowy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Wartość").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
dim iter : iter = 0 while not oRS.eof iter = iter + 1 'waluta dim oProj : set oProj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PROJEKT_ABAS,CLng(oRS("idobj").value)) dim strSkrot : strSkrot = "" if not oProj.proj_pWaluta is nothing then strSkrot = oProj.proj_pWaluta.strSkrot end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRS.fields("nazwa").value), doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PROJEKT_ABAS' vn2='"+cstr(oRS.fields("idobj").value)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRS.fields("data_um").value) pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.money(CCur(oRS("wartosc").value),strSkrot) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD oRS.movenext wend
end sub
sub plug_klient_obiekty(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim pCrsr : set pCrsr=trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT, _ "klob_pKlient=" + CStr(idKlient), "klob_strIndeks, klob_strNazwa", "")
if not pCrsr.exists(1) then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Indeks").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Produkt").element.bold = true
'dim iter:iter = 0 'while not oRecordset.eof ' iter = iter + 1 ' if iter > nLimit then ' exit sub ' end if ' ' pTB.newrow.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRecordset.fields("temat").value) , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("id").value)+"'") ' pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("rej").value) ' pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER ' pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRecordset.fields("wewy").value) ' pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_CENTER ' oRecordset.movenext 'wend
end sub
sub plug_klient_produkty(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim oRecordset #ifdef _IOW if InStr(pKlient.pGrupaKlient.strNazwa,"DOSTAWCA") > 0 then set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_products_zakup(pKlient)) else set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_products(pKlient)) end if #else set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql_for_products(pKlient)) #endif
if oRecordset.eof then exit sub end if
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_DOKUMENTY dim nPage: nPage = 5 if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = nPage then nLimit = 9999 else nLimit = 10 end if
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDok" .hli.prop(100) = nPage end with end if end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true #ifdef _IOW pTB.newcell.addtext("Indeks").element.bold = true #else pTB.newcell.addtext("Opakowanie").element.bold = true #endif pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Brutto").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
dim iter:iter = 0 while not oRecordset.eof iter = iter + 1 if iter > nLimit then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5PRODUKT' vn2='"+cstr(oRecordset.fields("p_id").value)+"'")
pTB.newcell.addtexthli oRecordset.fields("pname").value , hli #ifdef _IOW pTB.newcell.addtext(oRecordset.fields("pindeks").value) #else pTB.newcell.addtext(oRecordset.fields("oname").value) #endif
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(CCur(oRecordset.fields("curSUMIloscOpak").value), cstr(oRecordset.fields("skrot").value) , clng(oRecordset.fields("prec").value - 1))) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(CCur(oRecordset.fields("curSUMWartBrutto").value), cstr(oRecordset.fields("wal").value))) pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
oRecordset.movenext wend
end sub
'-------------------------------------------------------------------- #define TREE_COLSPAN 9
sub plug_klient_dzialania_tree(byref pTSRS,byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pCustomPB : set pCustomPB = pTSRS.new_custombuilder() pCustomPB.extracols = 3 pCustomPB.set_extra_builder getref("dzialania_tree_extra")
dim pTreeDef : set pTreeDef = pTSRS.new_explorer(pCustomPB)
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pKlient","c.idobj","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false
dim pTable : set pTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pTable.border = 0
dim oTB : set oTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTable)
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) <> -1 then oTB.newrow with oTB.newcell.cell .colspan = TREE_COLSPAN end with oTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with oTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllDzialania" .hli.prop(100) = 8 end with end if end if #else oTB.section_head #endif
oTB.newrow with oTB.newcell.cell .colspan = TREE_COLSPAN end with oTB.addtext "Temat"
#ifdef _SECURITY oTB.newcell.addtext "Data rozpoczęcia" #else oTB.newcell.addtext "Data zlecenia" #endif oTB.newcell.addtext "Typ" oTB.newcell.addtext "Status" pTSRS.initial_fill pTable,pTreeDef,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient end sub
function dzialania_tree_extra(byref pFirstExtraCell,byref pZadanie) '-- wyróżnij "wątki" ---
if pZadanie.pPopZadanie is nothing and pZadanie.pNadZadanie is nothing then pFirstExtraCell.parent.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN else dim strTip : strTip = "Pokaż szczegóły" if not pZadanie.pPopZadanie is nothing then strTip = strTip + " oraz zadanie poprzednie" end if if not pZadanie.pNadZadanie is nothing then strTip = strTip + " oraz zadanie nadrzędne" end if pFirstExtraCell.prevelement.element(2).tip = strTip end if
'- data - #ifdef _SECURITY pFirstExtraCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pZadanie.dDataRozp) #else pFirstExtraCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.fulldate(pZadanie.dDataZlec) #endif
'- typ pFirstExtraCell.nextelement.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = pZadanie.pTypDzialania.text '- status pFirstExtraCell.nextelement.nextelement.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = pZadanie.n5zadanie_getStatusName()
dzialania_tree_extra = true end function
sub plug_dzialania_powiazane_tree(byref pTSRS,byref pContainer,byval idZadanie)
if idZadanie = 0 then exit sub end if dim oZadanie : set oZadanie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,idZadanie) if not oZadanie.pNadZadanie is nothing then idZadanie = oZadanie.pNadZadanie.idobj else if not oZadanie.pPopZadanie is nothing then idZadanie = oZadanie.pPopZadanie.idobj end if end if
pContainer.removeall
dim pCustomPB : set pCustomPB = pTSRS.new_custombuilder() pCustomPB.extracols = 3 pCustomPB.set_extra_builder getref("dzialania_tree_extra")
dim pTreeDef : set pTreeDef = pTSRS.new_explorer(pCustomPB)
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"IdObj","c.strTemat","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.idobj","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false
dim pTable : set pTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pTable.border = 0 pTSRS.initial_fill pTable,pTreeDef,FIXED_ZADANIA,idZadanie end sub '--------------------------------------------------------------------
sub plug_klient_faktury(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) #ifdef NXM_EXPERIMENTAL_SET_1
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 nx_.build_sales_document_list doc_, pPlugInTable, idKlient
#else
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ , sqlwhere_for_faktury(pKlient) , "dDataWyst desc" , "") #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_SPRZEDAZ if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 1 then doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_faktury pContainer, cursor , 9999 else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_faktury pContainer, cursor , nLimit end if #else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_faktury pContainer, cursor , nLimit #endif
#endif end sub
sub plug_klient_zakupy(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) #ifdef NXM_EXPERIMENTAL_SET_1 dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 nx_.build_purchase_document_list doc_, pPlugInTable, idKlient #else if not HARUI(UAR_POKAZUJ_CENY_ZAKUPU) then exit sub end if
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP , sqlwhere_for_zakupy(pKlient) , "dDataOtrzym desc" , "")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAKUP if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 2 then doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zakup pContainer, cursor , 9999 else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zakup pContainer, cursor , nLimit end if #else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zakup pContainer, cursor , nLimit #endif #endif end sub
sub plug_klient_zamowienia(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim strWhere: strWhere = "" #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and dDataWyst >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE , "pKlient="+cstr(idKlient) + strWhere , "dDataWyst desc" , "")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_ZAMOWIENIE if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 6 then doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zamowienia pContainer, cursor , 9999 else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zamowienia pContainer, cursor , nLimit end if #else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_zamowienia pContainer, cursor , nLimit #endif end sub
sub plug_klient_platnosci(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim pModule:set pModule = doc_.getmodule(60166)
dim strWhere: strWhere = "" #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and dDataOper >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC , pModule.sqlwhere_for_podmiot(pKlient,"wrefPodmiot") + strWhere , "dDataOper desc" , "")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_PLATNOSCI if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 4 then pModule.plug_platnosci pContainer, cursor , 9999 , false , false , false , false , false , false , false , nothing , -1 , -1 , false , 0 else pModule.plug_platnosci pContainer, cursor , nLimit , false , false , false , false , false , false , false , nothing , -1 , -1 , false , 0 end if #else pModule.plug_platnosci pContainer, cursor , nLimit , false , false , false , false , false , false , false , nothing , -1 , -1 , false , 0 #endif end sub
sub plug_klient_rezerwacje(byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, "nTypDok = N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE and pKlient="+cstr(idKlient) , "dDataWyst desc" , "")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_REZERWACJE if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 7 then doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_rezerwacje pContainer, cursor , 9999 else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_rezerwacje pContainer, cursor , nLimit end if #else doc_.getmodule(60166).plug_rezerwacje pContainer, cursor , nLimit #endif end sub
sub plug_klient_transakcje(byref pPage,byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim pModule:set pModule = doc_.getmodule(60166) dim strWhere: strWhere = "" strWhere = " and IdObj not in (select pTransakcja from n5sprzedaz where pRejestrDok in (select IdObj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)))"
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and dDataWym >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA , pModule.sqlwhere_for_podmiot(pKlient,"wrefPodmiot") + strWhere, "dDataWym desc" , "")
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_ALL_DOKUM_TRANSAKCJA if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM) = 3 then pModule.plug_transakcje pContainer, cursor , 9999 else pModule.plug_transakcje pContainer, cursor , nLimit end if #else pModule.plug_transakcje pContainer, cursor , nLimit #endif
#ifdef _DEBUG dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pPage.addxml pContainer.ident, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@ostatnie_transakcje_klienta@"),10,"wrefPodmiot_wrt=TYPEID_N5KLIENT and wrefPodmiot="+cstr(pKlient.idobj),2).getstring() #endif
end sub
sub plug_klient_obiekty(byref pPage,byref pContainer,byval idKlient) dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pPage.addxml pContainer.ident, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT) _ #ifdef _RAND .raports.get_raport_by_name("@obiekty_klienta@"),1000,"klob_pKlient="+cstr(idKlient),2).getstring() #else .raports.get_raport_by_name("@obiekty_klienta@"),100,"klob_pKlient="+cstr(idKlient),2).getstring() #endif end sub
sub plug_klient_jednostki(byref pPage, byref pContainer, byval idKlient) dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pPage.addxml pContainer.ident, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@jednostki_klienta@"), 100, "pKlient=" + cstr(idKlient), 2).getstring() end sub
sub plug_klient_konta(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient) dim pModule:set pModule = doc_.getmodule(60166) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5KONTO , pModule.sqlwhere_for_podmiot(pKlient,"wrefPodmiotRozrach") , "strSymbol" , "") pModule.plug_konta pContainer, cursor
end sub
sub plug_klient_promocje(byref pContainer,byval idKlient)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
dim iLimit : iLimit = 0 dim bBuildWszystkie : bBuildWszystkie = true
if trans_.isvar(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_RIGHT) then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_RIGHT) <> -1 then if trans_.var(GVAR_SELECTED_TAB_ITEM_RIGHT) = 3 then iLimit = 9999 bBuildWszystkie = false end if end if end if
if bBuildWszystkie then pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 with pTB.element .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Wszystkie" set .hli = doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "ShowAllRight" .hli.prop(100) = 3 end with end if
if iLimit = 0 then exit sub end if
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5POLRAB , _ pKlient.n5klient_sqlwhere_for_promotions, "strNazwaPromocji" , "") if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 1
pTB.newcell pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa prod./grupa/klient").element.bold = true with pTB.cell .align=ALIGN_CENTER .colspan=2 end with ' pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa prod./grupa/klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena / Rabat").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
dim elem dim strProd dim strProd2 for each elem in cursor
pTB.newrow
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 dim pPicture:set pPicture = pTB.element if not elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW) end if else if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT) else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT) end if else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) end if end if
dim pPict: set pPict = pTB.element set pPict=doc_.createhli()
set pPicture.hli = pPict set pPicture.hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5POLRAB' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") if not elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then pPicture.tip = "Produkt" else pPicture.tip = "Grupa" end if else if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then pPicture.tip = "Klient" else pPicture.tip = "Grupa klientów" end if end if end if
' pTB.newcell.addtext(elem.strNazwaPromocji) if elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then strProd = "<dowolny>" strProd2= "<dowolny>" if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then strProd = elem.wpKlientGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= elem.wpKlientGrupa.strIndeks else strProd = elem.wpKlientGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= " (grupa klientów)" end if end if else if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then #ifdef APPCONFIG_RAPORT_BY_PROD_INX strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.strIndeks strProd2= elem.wpProdGrupa.strNazwa #else strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= elem.wpProdGrupa.strIndeks #endif else strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.text strProd2 = "" end if end if pTB.newcell.addtext(strProd).cell.width=4 pTB.newcell.addtext(strProd2) if elem.eTyp=1 or elem.eTyp=2 then pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strskrot)).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT else pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, "%")).cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end if
next
end sub
'---------------------------------------------------------- 'wyświetla promocje na wybranym formularzu w jednym wierszu '---------------------------------------------------------- sub plug_klient_promocje_row(byref oRow, byref pContainer,byval idKlient) pContainer.removeall
dim pKlient : set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKlient)
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5POLRAB , _ pKlient.n5klient_sqlwhere_for_promotions, "strNazwaPromocji" , "") if not cursor.exists(1) then exit sub end if
'pokaż wiersz z promocjami oRow.hide = false
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow
dim elem dim strProd dim strProd2, iter: iter = 0 for each elem in cursor
if iter mod 6 = 0 then pTB.newrow end if
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE , -1 pTB.cell.width = 4 dim pPicture:set pPicture = pTB.element if not elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW) end if else if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT) else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT) end if else pPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) end if end if
dim pPict: set pPict = pTB.element set pPict=doc_.createhli()
set pPicture.hli = pPict set pPicture.hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='TYPEID_N5POLRAB' vn2='"+cstr(elem.idobj)+"'") if not elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then pPicture.tip = "Produkt" else pPicture.tip = "Grupa" end if else if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then pPicture.tip = "Klient" else pPicture.tip = "Grupa klientów" end if end if end if
if elem.wpProdGrupa is nothing then strProd = "<dowolny>" strProd2= "<dowolny>" if not elem.wpKlientGrupa is nothing then if elem.wpKlientGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then strProd = elem.wpKlientGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= elem.wpKlientGrupa.strIndeks else strProd = elem.wpKlientGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= " (grupa klientów)" end if end if else if elem.wpProdGrupa.type = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then #ifdef APPCONFIG_RAPORT_BY_PROD_INX strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.strIndeks strProd2= elem.wpProdGrupa.strNazwa #else strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.strNazwa strProd2= elem.wpProdGrupa.strIndeks #endif else strProd = elem.wpProdGrupa.text strProd2 = "" end if end if pTB.newcell.addtext(strProd).element.bold = true pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) 'pTB.newcell.addtext(strProd2) if elem.eTyp=1 or elem.eTyp=2 then pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, elem.polrab_pWalutaCeny.strskrot)).element.bold = true else pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(elem.curCenaRab, "%")).element.bold = true end if pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(1200) pTB.newcell.addtext("").cell.width = clng(300)
iter = iter + 1 next
end sub
'where dla kursora z fakturami function sqlwhere_for_faktury(byval pKlient) dim strWhere: strWhere = "" #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and dDataWyst >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif
sqlwhere_for_faktury = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "pRejestrDok not in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)) and pRozlVAT<>0 and idobj not in (select pPopSprzed from n5sprzedaz) and pKlient = %1 " + strWhere) _ .add(CStr(pKlient.idobj)) _ .done() #ifdef _TORAL if pKlient.ePrywat = N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA then sqlwhere_for_faktury = Replace(sqlwhere_for_faktury,"pRozlVAT<>0 and","") end if #endif #ifdef _RAND sqlwhere_for_faktury = Replace(sqlwhere_for_faktury,"pRozlVAT<>0 and","") #endif end function
'where dla kursora z fakturami function sqlwhere_for_zakupy(byval pKlient) dim strWhere: strWhere = "" #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL if trans_.var(GVAR_SPRZEDAZ_LAST_12_MONTHS) = 1 then strWhere = strWhere + " and dDataWyst >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dateadd("m",-12,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) end if #endif sqlwhere_for_zakupy = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "idobj not in (select pPopZakup from n5zakup) and pDostawca = %1 " + strWhere) _ .add(CStr(pKlient.idobj)) _ .done() end function
'............................................ ' Obroty z naszą firmą '............................................ function sql_for_obroty(byval pKlient)
sql_for_obroty = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ #ifdef _ALMA_TREND "select isNull(sum(trop_curWnEwid),0) as obroty, " + _ "isNull(sum(trop_curMaEwid),0) as Platnosci " + _ "From vw_n5transakcja_trop " + _ #else "select isNull(sum(curWn),0) as obroty, " + _ "isNull(sum(curMa),0) as Platnosci " + _ "From n5transakcja " + _ #endif "where wrefpodmiot=%1 and wrefpodmiot_wrt = TYPEID_N5KLIENT" ) _ .add(CStr(pKlient.idobj)) _ .done()
end function
'......................................................... 'zapytanie zwraca naleznosci lub zobowiazania danego podmiotu 'moze zwrocic przeterminowane lub nie 'N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE 'N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC '......................................................... function get_nal_zob(byref pPodmiot, byval bPrzeterminowane, byval eTyp, byval bWartEwid) get_nal_zob = ccur(0.0)
dim dDataWym : dDataWym = dateserial(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))+1,12,31) if bPrzeterminowane then dDataWym = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) end if
dim strWhere: strWhere = "" if bWartEwid then strWhere = strWhere + "(curWn - curMa) <> 0 and " end if
dim strSQL strSQL = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ #ifdef _ALMA_TREND "select isNull(sum(trop_curWnEwid)-sum(trop_curMaEwid),0) as Wartosc from vw_n5transakcja_trop where " +_ #else "select isNull(sum(curWn)-sum(curMa),0) as Wartosc, isNull(sum(curWnEwid)-sum(curMaEwid),0) as WartoscEwid from n5transakcja where " +_ #endif "wrefpodmiot = %1 and wrefpodmiot_wrt = %2 and " + strWhere +_ #ifdef _TORAL " dDataWym <= %3 and eTyp=%4" ) _ #else " dDataWym < %3 and eTyp=%4" ) _ #endif .add(pPodmiot.idobj) _ .add(pPodmiot.type) _ .add(doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataWym)) _ .add(eTyp) _ .done() dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if not oRS.EOF then if bWartEwid then get_nal_zob = ccur(oRS("WartoscEwid").value) else get_nal_zob = ccur(oRS("Wartosc").value) end if end if end function
'należności i zobowiązania wg jednostki organizacyjnej (powiązane ze sprzedażą/zakupem) 'gdy idJO > 0 => zwraca wartość tylko dla tej jednostki 'gdy idJO = 0 => zwraca wartość dla dokumentów bez jednostki function get_nal_zob_ext(byref pPodmiot, byval bPrzeterminowane, byval eTyp, byval idJO) get_nal_zob_ext = get_nal_zob_ext_okres(pPodmiot, bPrzeterminowane, eTyp, idJO, "") end function
function get_nal_zob_ext_okres(byref pPodmiot, byval bPrzeterminowane, byval eTyp, byval idJO, byval strOkres) get_nal_zob_ext_okres = ccur(0.0)
dim dDataWym : dDataWym = dateserial(2115,12,31) if bPrzeterminowane then dDataWym = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) end if dim strTable, strKlieDost if eTyp = N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE then strTable = "n5zakup" strKlieDost = "pDostawca" else strTable = "n5sprzedaz" strKlieDost = "pKlient" end if dim strSQL strSQL = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select isnull(sum(t.curWn)-sum(t.curMa),0) as Wartosc " + vbNewLine +_ "from " + strTable + " s " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5transakcja t on s.pTransakcja = t.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5klient k on s." + strKlieDost + " = k.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "left outer join n5_klient_jedn_org jo on s." + strKlieDost + "_JO = jo.idobj " + vbNewLine +_ "where " + strOkres + " t.wrefpodmiot = %1 and t.wrefpodmiot_wrt = %2 and " + vbNewLine +_ " t.dDataWym < %3 and eTyp = %4 " + vbNewLine +_ " and s." + strKlieDost + "_JO = %5" ) _ .add(pPodmiot.idobj) _ .add(pPodmiot.type) _ .add(doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataWym)) _ .add(eTyp) _ .add(idJO) _ .done() dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if not oRS.EOF then get_nal_zob_ext_okres = ccur(oRS("Wartosc").value) end if end function
'zapytanie do ado - lista produktow ktore zakupil klient pKlient 'wraz z wartoscią tych zakupów function sql_for_products(byval pKlient) sql_for_products = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select max(p_dDataWyst),n5produkt.idobj as p_id , n5produkt.strNazwa as pname, n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as oname , " + _ "sum(c_curIloscOpak) as curSUMIloscOpak, sum(c_curWartNetto + c_curVAT) as curSUMWartBrutto, max(n5jednostka.nDokladnosc) as prec, " + _ "max(n5jednostka.strSkrot) as skrot, waluta.strSkrot as wal, max(n5produkt.strIndeks) as pindeks " + _ "from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje as t_sprzed " + _ "join n5produkt on n5produkt.idobj=t_sprzed.c_pProdukt " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj= t_sprzed.c_pOpak " + _ "join n5jednostka on n5jednostka.idobj=n5produkt.pJednostkaEwid " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on waluta.idobj=t_sprzed.p_pWaluta " + _ "where t_sprzed.p_pRozlVAT<>0 and t_sprzed.p_idobj not in (select pPopSprzed from n5sprzedaz) and t_sprzed.p_pRejestrDok not in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA, N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA)) " + _ "and (t_sprzed.p_pKlient=%1) " + _ "group by n5produkt.idobj , n5produkt.strNazwa , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa , waluta.strSkrot " + _ "order by curSUMWartBrutto desc, curSUMIloscOpak desc" ) _ .add(CStr(pKlient.idobj)) _ .done() end function
'-------------------------- 'zakup produktów u dostawcy '-------------------------- function sql_for_products_zakup(byval pDostawca) sql_for_products_zakup = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select max(p_dDataWyst),n5produkt.idobj as p_id , n5produkt.strNazwa as pname, n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa as oname , " + _ "sum(c_curIloscOpak) as curSUMIloscOpak, sum(c_curWartNetto + c_curVAT) as curSUMWartBrutto, max(n5jednostka.nDokladnosc) as prec, " + _ "max(n5jednostka.strSkrot) as skrot, waluta.strSkrot as wal, max(n5produkt.strIndeks) as pindeks " + _ "from vlist_n5zakup_listPozycje as t_zakup " + _ "join n5produkt on n5produkt.idobj=t_zakup.c_pProdukt " + _ "join n5opakowanie_produktu on n5opakowanie_produktu.idobj= t_zakup.c_pOpak " + _ "join n5jednostka on n5jednostka.idobj=n5produkt.pJednostkaEwid " + _ "join n5jednostka as waluta on waluta.idobj=t_zakup.p_pWaluta " + _ "where t_zakup.p_pRozlVAT<>0 and t_zakup.p_idobj not in (select pPopZakup from n5zakup) " + _ "and (t_zakup.p_pDostawca=%1) " + _ "group by n5produkt.idobj , n5produkt.strNazwa , n5opakowanie_produktu.strNazwa , waluta.strSkrot " + _ "order by curSUMWartBrutto desc, curSUMIloscOpak desc" ) _ .add(CStr(pDostawca.idobj)) _ .done() end function
#comment '---------------------------- #comment 'liczba punktow w programie lojalnosciowym #comment '---------------------------- function nx_get_suma_punktow_progloj(byval idKlient) dim strSQL : strSQL = "select isnull(sum(proloj_curSumaPunkty),0) as suma " +_ " from n5proglojal where proloj_pKlient = " + cstr(idKlient)
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) if not oRS.EOF then nx_get_suma_punktow_progloj = ccur(oRS("suma").value) end if end function
